comments.main: expo-router/entry chosen here because Expo SDK 51 routes through it by default. We use it as the bootstrap; navigation is handled by React Navigation directly inside App.tsx so we still own the routing model.
comments.@react-native-async-storage/async-storag: Pinned to 1.23.1 — the version that pairs with Expo SDK 51. Don't bump independently or `expo doctor` will complain.
comments.lucide-react-native: Same icon set as the web app. Keeps visual parity between platforms.
comments.expo-notifications: Wired but inert until a server-side trigger is added (Phase 2 follow-up). Still needs to be installed at scaffold time so the AndroidManifest gets the right permissions.
comments.react-native-url-polyfill: Required by @supabase/supabase-js in React Native — its fetch/url shims fix the 'URL is not defined' runtime error you'd otherwise see on first auth call.
